examples.code: IF &TESTSW DO Group A (group of CL commands) . . ENDDO ELSE DO Group B (group of CL commands) . . ENDDO Group C (continued CL commands) . .
IF COND(&A *EQ &B) THEN(DO) CMD1 CMD2 . . ENDDO
IF COND(&A *EQ &B) THEN(GOTO X) IF (&A *EQ &B) THEN(GOTO X) IF (&A *EQ &B) (GOTO X) IF COND(&A *EQ &B) THEN(GOTO X)
IF &TEST THEN(DO) CHGVAR &A (&A + 1) GOTO X ENDDO ELSE DO CHGVAR &B (&B + 1) CALL EXTPGM (&B) ENDDO
IF (&A *EQ YES) DO CHGVAR &B 1 CHGVAR &C 'Z' ENDDO
